non_blocking_findings.summary: The original test:coverage regex was start-anchored only. It still verified wrapper usage, but a trailing anchor would better detect suffix tampering.

questions_answered: package.json routes npm test and test:coverage through tools/run-with-node18.mjs
test/package-scripts.test.js covers the package script wrapper constraint
docs/governance/known-risk-ledger.json marks only risk-20260601-npm-test-node-wrapper fixed with consistent evidence, reviewer, commit, and count state
notes: DeepSeek final closeout review found no blocking gaps. The non-blocking regex hardening recommendation was applied before final commit.
